title: hopea coriacea
intro: Hopea coriacea, also known as the seraya tree or yellow meranti, is a species of tropical tree native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hopea coriacea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the bark of the tree is often dried and processed into capsules or teas, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions.
